hooks.command: command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'cadence: python3 is required but not found on PATH. Install Python 3.11+ to use this plugin.' >&2; exit 1; }; command -v ffmpeg >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'cadence: ffmpeg is required but not found on PATH.' >&2; exit 1; }; diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/server/python/requirements.txt" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/requirements.txt" >/dev/null 2>&1 || ( python3 -m venv "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/venv" && "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/venv/bin/pip" install --quiet -r "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/server/python/requirements.txt" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/server/python/requirements.txt" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/requirements.txt" ) || { rm -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/requirements.txt"; echo 'cadence: failed to install Python dependencies.' >&2; exit 1; }
